listitem.para: Describe traditional Italian American gender roles. What are their implications for health-care decision-making?
How do you determine cyanosis and jaundice in dark-skinned Italians?
What are common health conditions for Italian Americans?
What are the dangers associated with the ingestion of fava beans and the administration of sulfonamides, antimalarial agents, salicylates, and naphthaquinolones in Italian Americans?
Identify several foods used for health promotion. What illnesses will they help prevent?
Identify some common beliefs and customs about pregnancy? Are any of them harmful?
In traditional terms, to what are illnesses attributed?
Many traditional Italians believe in Il mal occhio. What is this and what is done to protect oneself?
What are maghi and streghe? What are their functions?
Explain the basic rites of the Sacrament of the Sick. What is the purpose?
